title: Daewoo Mini Chopper With 1 Litre Glass Bowl, Food Chopper With 4 Stainless Steel Blades, Anti-slip bottom, Safety locking lid, Food Chopper Electric, 500W Motor
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: TRANSPARENT GLASS BOWL – The spacious, clear glass bowl allows you to easily monitor food. Whether you're chopping vegetables or making salsa, you can see the consistency without stopping. Its size is ideal for making guacamole or sauces for a family meal

STAINLESS STEEL BLADES – Equipped with four ultra-sharp, durable stainless-steel blades, this chopper efficiently handles tough ingredients like nuts or frozen fruit. The detachable blades make cleaning after prepping hummus or pesto a breeze

USER-FRIENDLY – A powerful 500W motor ensures smooth and fast chopping, from soft herbs to harder foods. The one-touch control makes it easy to switch between two speeds, perfect for finely chopping onions at low speed or pureeing baby food at high speed

SAFETY – The bowl features an anti-slip rubber ring at the base, keeping the chopper stable even on slick countertops. The safety-locking lid ensures the blades won't engage unless securely locked, offering peace of mind when preparing ingredients

PEACE OF MIND – Enjoy worry-free use with a 3-year warranty, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliability. Simply register online to activate your warranty, giving you confidence that any unexpected issues will be promptly addressed
description: The Daewoo Mini Chopper is perfect for busy home cooks and small families who need quick, efficient food prep. Whether you’re chopping veggies for a salad, preparing salsa, or pureeing baby food, this versatile chopper gets the job done in seconds. Its 1-litre transparent glass bowl allows you to monitor your ingredients for the perfect texture, whether you're mincing garlic or making creamy hummus. With easy, one-touch operation and two speed settings, this chopper is incredibly user-friendly. Choose the low speed for delicate herbs or the high speed for tougher ingredients like nuts. The four diamond-cut stainless-steel blades are designed to tackle a variety of tasks, and they detach easily for quick cleaning. Safety is a top priority with the Daewoo Mini Chopper. The anti-slip rubber ring ensures the bowl stays stable on your countertop, even during high-speed chopping. Plus, the safety-locking lid means the blades won’t start spinning until the lid is securely in place, offering peace of mind for any user. Backed by a 3-year warranty (with online registration), you can count on reliable performance for all your food prep needs.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎1 Litre, Glass bowl for transparency, 4 Diamond cut stainless-steel blades, Safety locking lid, Anti-slip rubber ring, One touch operation, 2 Speeds, 500W motor
